characterGameInformation.comment:
Noone can live forever...




On Valoria:

4th druid to lvl 100
1st druid to 110-136 and 150
18:33 You have found a stonecutter axe. 01.05.07 2nd mage team

Senior tutor July 2006-July 2008

First to get full assassin, norseman on Valoria


2005: 16:49 You see a bed. Trollbollnollkoll is sleeping there. Last sight of trollbollnollkoll. R.I.P
